import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

def task_func(csv_file_path: str, title: str):
    # Load the data from CSV file
    df = pd.read_csv(csv_file_path)

    # Calculate the correlation matrix and round to 2 decimal places
    corr_matrix = df.corr().round(decimals=2)

    # Create a heatmap with seaborn
    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
    sns.heatmap(corr_matrix, annot=True, cmap="coolwarm")

    # Set title and labels for the plot
    plt.title(title)
    plt.xlabel("Variables")
    plt.ylabel("Variables")

    # Return the correlation DataFrame and Axes object
    return corr_matrix, plt.gca()
